source_pr.title: ttl: add metrics for task manager
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: YangKeao <yangkeao@chunibyo.icu>

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #40810

Problem Summary:

Add a metric to track the owned task with different task status.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/5244316/215321146-991e9a79-ad2a-4fc1-9357-f1cbdd52a382.png)

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: + race = "on",.

evidence: files: metrics/grafana/tidb.json, metrics/metrics.go, metrics/ttl.go, ttl/metrics/metrics.go, ttl/ttlworker/BUILD.bazel, ttl/ttlworker/job_manager.go, ttl/ttlworker/job_manager_integration_test.go, ttl/ttlworker/job_manager_test.go, ttl/ttlworker/task_manager.go, ttl/ttlworker/task_manager_integration_test.go, ttl/ttlworker/task_manager_test.go
